n: Chapter 5.6: A Place for the Lost

steps.t: Nauriel has returned to the Wave-hunter in the Shield Isles and will surely have a plan.
Nauriel believes you should ask the folk who live in Halrax, on the island of Zamarzîr, what they know about the bounty hunters recruited by Saklaphêl…
Daxamat has come to Halrax in search of more information, and can be found at the bottom of the hill on the eastern side of the city.
Nauriel is back at the Wave-hunter, waiting for information about the bounty hunters recruited by Saklaphêl.
